summary: Home Dashboard Feature - Complete frontend testing passed. All 14 test cases verified. Login redirects to /home, all widgets display correctly, New Task and Schedule Meeting dialogs work, task creation form submits successfully, Home navigation is active in sidebar.
passed_tests: New Task button visible with data-testid='new-task-btn'
Schedule Meeting button visible with data-testid='new-meeting-btn'
Action Items widget displays tasks and shows '1 pending' badge
Upcoming Follow-ups widget visible with 'View all' link
Leads to Focus On widget shows leads with win probability percentages (22%, 8%, 4%)
Monthly Performance widget shows Target and Achieved values
Pipeline Summary widget shows lead status distribution (New: 7, Contacted: 1, Won: 3, Lost: 1)
Upcoming Meetings widget shows scheduled meetings (Test API Meeting - Tomorrow)
Home navigation item visible and active (highlighted) in sidebar under Core
Today's Summary Cards display (Activities, Calls, Emails, Meetings)
New Task dialog opens with all form fields (Title, Description, Type, Priority, Due Date, Time, Assign To)
Schedule Meeting dialog opens with all form fields (Title, Description, Type, Duration, Date, Time, Location, Attendees)
Task creation form submits successfully - toast 'Task created successfully' shown
Created task appears in Action Items widget after submission
critical_code_review_comments: HomeDashboard.js properly uses API_URL from process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Dashboard fetches data from /api/dashboard endpoint which returns comprehensive data
Form dialogs use proper state management with useState hooks
Task and Meeting forms have validation (required fields checked before submission)
seed_data_creation: Created test task 'Test Task from Dashboard' and test meeting 'Test API Meeting' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home Dashboard at /home is fully functional. All widgets display correctly. Task and Meeting creation forms work. The Home navigation is the first item under 'Core' in sidebar. Dashboard submenu under Dashboard still exists for Sales Overview reports. Backend endpoints /api/dashboard, /api/tasks, /api/meetings are all working correctly.

dashboard_widgets: Today's Summary Cards (Activities, Calls, Emails, Meetings)
Upcoming Follow-ups (leads with near follow-up dates)
Leads to Focus On (based on win probability)

new_task_dialog.submission: Works correctly - creates task and shows in Action Items

features_verified.sidebar_navigation: Home link is first under Core section and is highlighted when active
